name: Afcom Holdings - Sky High Ambitions, Grounded in Reality?

posts.author: radhakishandamani
posts.community: Afcom Holdings - Sky High Ambitions, Grounded in Reality?
posts.text: Looks like it’s going to be a weak Q1FY27. The west of Chennai routes - Hanoi, Yangon etc have been slashed down considerably since the fuel shortage started.
